description: You are a Maintenance Director performing a quarterly warranty audit using OpenMaint (login: admin/admin at http://localhost:8090/cmdbuild/ui/). Based on the procurement report at /home/ga/Desktop/warranty_audit_report.txt, update the Description or Notes field for WAR-HVAC-001, WAR-HVAC-002, and WAR-ELEV-001 with their new warranty expiration dates. Create 'High' priority corrective maintenance work orders for WAR-GEN-001 and WAR-ELEC-003, ensuring the CI code is included in the description. Mark WAR-ELEC-001 as 'OUT OF WARRANTY' in its notes. Do not modify the record for WAR-PUMP-002. Locate existing records via search without creating new CIs.
